azure-mcp-server.note: Official Azure MCP Server — single unified server for Azure Monitor, Cosmos DB, Application Insights, Key Vault, Storage, RBAC, and 50+ Azure services. Source: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp/tree/main/servers/Azure.Mcp.Server

microsoft-enterprise-mcp.note: Official Microsoft MCP Server for Enterprise — queries Entra ID / Microsoft Graph via RAG. Requires tenant provisioning: see docs/DEMO_PLAN_REAL.md Phase 1. Docs: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/mcp-server/get-started
